_howto: Copy this file, rename it <topic>.json, and drop it into content/quizzes/<subject folder>/. 'answer' is the position of the correct option counting from 0 (so 0 = first option, 1 = second). 'explain' is optional. The _howto and _example entries are ignored by the site — delete them when you are done.

questions.q: Which gas do plants take in?
questions.explain: Plants absorb CO2 and release O2.
